docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEMING, CAITLIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KINCADE, ROBIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DEMING, CAITLIN AS TO DEFENDANT KINCADE, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED APR-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KINCADE, ROBIN
